For more information, try '--help'.",

$(mktemp); { cd /Users/a_conte/dev/openclaw-agents && codex exec --sandbox works
pace-write -a never 'Project: Dashboard Cleanup
Description: I want the dashboard to be fast, simple, and effective. pretend you
 are a senior software engineer and data scientist, with the goal of making the
most useful dashboard for agentic ai possible. feel free to use codex skills whi
le working. and feel free to dangerously skip permissions. once you are done, se
nd me the PR to approve

Work this project in the current repo using Codex. Start by assessing the projec
t context, then execute the next concrete engineering step.
Keep working until you either complete a meaningful chunk, hit a real blocker, o
r need operator input for a dangerous decision.
Known project tasks:
- No project tasks are linked yet. Start by assessing the repo and proposing the
 next concrete steps.'; } >"$drive_stdout_file" 2>"$drive_stderr_file"; drive_ex
it_code=$?; prin%

ile=$(mktemp); drive_stderr_file=$(mktemp); { cd /Users/a_conte/dev/openclaw-age

nce you are done, send me the PR to approve

po and proposing the next concrete steps.'; } >"$drive_stdout_file" 2>"$drive_st
derr_file"; drive_exit_code=$?; printf '__STDOUT_START_fe9a8d9100\n'; cat "$driv
e_stdout_file"; printf '\n__STDOUT_END_fe9a8d9100\n'; printf '__STDERR_START_fe9
a8d9100\n'; cat "$drive_stderr_file"; printf '\n__STDERR_END_fe9a8d9100\n'; rm -
f "$drive_stdout_file" "$drive_stderr_file"; printf '__DONE_fe9a8d9100:%s\n' "$d
rive_exit_code"

file" "$drive_stderr_file"; printf '__DONE_2cda560bd3:%s\n' "$drive_exit_code"

"$drive_stderr_file"; drive_exit_code=$?; printf '__STDOUT_START_2cda560bd3\n';
cat "$drive_stdout_file"; printf '\n__STDOUT_END_2cda560bd3\n'; printf '__STDERR

3\n'; rm -f "$drive_stdout_file" "$drive_stderr_file"; printf '__DONE_2cda560bd3
